title: Rank Sales Amount within Region Var 2
description: Rank individual sale transactions within each region based on their sale amount. Return salesperson name, region, sale amount, and their rank as sale_rank.
constraints: multiple ranks allowed on duplicate amounts
hints: Partition by region, order by amount desc

solution.approach: Window Function RANK OVER PARTITION BY
solution.query: SELECT sp.name, sp.region, s.amount, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region ORDER BY s.amount DESC) AS sale_rank FROM SalesPerson sp JOIN Sale s ON sp.id = s.salesperson_id;

title: Cardiologists Treatment Statistics Var 3
description: Find doctors specializing in Cardiology with more than 10 years experience, and count the total patients treated by them. Return doctor name, experience, and patient count as patient_count.
hints: Join patient records to count ID

solution.approach: Common Table Expressions with Left Join Grouping
solution.query: WITH CardDocs AS (SELECT id, name, experience FROM Doctor WHERE specialization = 'Cardiology' AND experience > 10) SELECT cd.name, cd.experience, COUNT(p.id) AS patient_count FROM CardDocs cd LEFT JOIN Patient p ON cd.id = p.doctor_id GROUP BY cd.id, cd.name, cd.experience;
